rationale: AC provenance + doc-coherence lens, verified in an absolute /tmp archive of 41d8e8af (live worktree untouched, git status clean). Walked AC1-AC12 in spec.md against shipped code + a named passing test each; every mapping is REAL. AC1 TestPanelGateDecision_UnresolvedRequestChangesBlocks + TestPanelGate_RequestChangesBlocksComplete; AC2 TestPanelGateDecision_Refutations + TestPanelRefuted_WriteMetadata + _E2E_SatisfiesAndRecordsBothEntries; AC3/4/8/9/12 rows in TestPanelGateDecision_Refutations(+_DuplicateSlotCasing) + TestResult_AppliedRefutations + _ApprovesExcludesUnresolvedVerdicts; AC5 four-flip fixtures present (TestPanelAdvisory_Dissent_WouldBlock + _Passing_WouldPass companion, votedecision); AC6 grep hits ADR(36)+SKILL(4); AC7 _ThresholdFloorIsLayeredNotReplaced; AC10 _EveryBlockEndsWithFence + TestPanelGate_BlockNeverNamesSkipVar. AC11 is confirmed the AMENDED no-discharge form: SatisfyFromMarker_PanelGone/MarkerCarriesReasonEvidence/NaturalResolution_NoObligation all PASS and their bodies assert satisfy-from-self-contained-marker (panel.json removed still writes honest panel_refuted from marker); ZERO discharge tests and no refutation_discharged in code (only comments documenting its deletion). Doc coherence holds: ADR-0037 §1/§3/§6/§7/§8 amendments describe the shipped self-contained-marker design ('audit written from that record, never by re-reading panels'), both SKILL copies byte-identical and no-discharge, plan AC11 row + Bead-2 DESIGN AMENDMENT reflect the deletion. Empirical: go build ./... OK, gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal EMPTY, go vet OK, full suite (panel/complete/bead/cmd/instruct) PASS, panel -race clean. Two non-blocking nits below.

findings.summary: Frozen spec.md AC11 (line 90) still describes the deleted verified-discharge mechanism (refutation_discharged, 'verified discharge'), which the shipped code deliberately lacks. This is the approved-before-deletion frozen artifact, superseded by the plan's Bead-2 DESIGN AMENDMENT + reviews/spec-114-bead2/consolidated-round-3.md under the forward-only lifecycle (ADR-0023). The SHIPPED ADR-0037 + both SKILL copies are clean (no-discharge), and the BRIEF explicitly authorizes the superseded-not-contradictory reading. Recorded for provenance, not blocking.

Plan Provenance table AC2 row names 'TestWritePanelRefutedMetadata' but the shipped test is 'TestPanelRefuted_WriteMetadata' (both under the -run 'PanelRefuted' proof command, so the runnable proof still selects it). Cosmetic naming drift in the doc map only.
